label: Blink
summary: Inline text that blinks at exactly one hertz.
era: Netscape's <blink> tag, born of a 1994 bar joke about Lynx, back, and holding steady at one flash per second.

classes.name: rs-blink
classes.role: 1Hz steps(1) opacity blink; bold + underline under reduced motion

a11y: One flash per second sits well under the three-per-second photosensitivity ceiling. Under prefers-reduced-motion it renders as static bold plus underline, the emphasis survives, the blinking does not.
